headline: International Paper closes North Pacific Paper Company deal
summary: The deal forms part of International Paper's transformation aimed at creating value for customers, employees and shareholders.

raw.headline: International Paper closes North Pacific Paper Company deal
raw.summary: The deal forms part of International Paper's transformation aimed at creating value for customers, employees and shareholders.

headline: International Paper taps CPKC for rail needs at Mississippi facility
summary: The paper and pulp company's upcoming packaging site will be able to use the railroad's single-line network to strengthen its supply chain.

raw.headline: International Paper taps CPKC for rail needs at Mississippi facility
raw.summary: The paper and pulp company's upcoming packaging site will be able to use the railroad's single-line network to strengthen its supply chain.
